name: anyside
description: A Manifest V3 Chrome extension that keeps AI services in the Chrome Side Panel.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build.mjs --bundle-content
scripts.build:test: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build.mjs --bundle-content --testing-hooks
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build:test && node --test test/*.test.mjs
scripts.release:zip: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs && node scripts/audit-release-artifact.mjs
